name: Custom Payload Hardware Integration
description: You are a Remote Sensing Technologist upgrading an ArduCopter survey drone with a custom multispectral camera and a 2-axis servo gimbal. Configure the flight controller parameters in QGroundControl according to the hardware integration wiring sheet located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/hardware_wiring.txt. Ensure all subsystem types, pin mappings, and dynamic parameters (including MNT1 and CAM1 settings) are correctly enabled and configured. Once the vehicle is configured, create a log file at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/integration_log.txt containing the exact phrase specified in the wiring sheet.
